description: Redesign sidebar TaskPanel for improved density and create the Full-Screen Task Manager view with spreadsheet-style layout, group-centric view, expandable notes, and group colors
steps: Create src/FullTaskManager.jsx - a new full-screen task manager component. It receives the same props as TaskPanel plus: onSwitchToSidebar (callback to switch back to sidebar view). This component will occupy most of the screen space (rendered as an overlay or as the main content area replacing the canvas).

FULL-SCREEN LAYOUT: The FullTaskManager uses a group-centric view (not date-section-centric). Layout: top toolbar with search, status filter, 'Collapse to Sidebar' button. Main content area shows all groups as collapsible sections simultaneously. Each group section has: colored header bar (using group.color), group name, task count, collapse/expand toggle.

TABLE LAYOUT: Within each group section, render tasks in a compact spreadsheet-style table. Columns: Status (checkbox/icon), Task Title, Location (pin icon if has location), Priority (badge), Due Date. One task = one row. Minimal padding (py-1 px-2). No multi-line cards. Use text-xs for density. Table header row with column labels in text-[10px] uppercase text-slate-400.

EXPANDABLE NOTES: When a user clicks a task row, expand that task inline - show the full task note in a bordered area directly beneath the clicked row and above the next task. Only one task can be expanded at a time. Clicking another row collapses the previous and expands the new one. The expanded area shows: full notes text, edit button, delete button, set location button, group reassignment dropdown. Use selectedTaskId state for tracking which is expanded.

INLINE EDITING: In the expanded row area, allow inline editing of status (dropdown), priority (dropdown), due date (date input), group (dropdown), and notes (textarea). Provide Save/Cancel buttons. Double-click on task title to edit it inline.

GROUP COLORS IN FULL VIEW: Each group header uses the group's assigned color for: left border (4px), background tint, text color. Task rows within a group have a subtle left-border-color matching the group. Add a color picker (small color dots) in the group header for changing group color.

SIDEBAR DENSITY IMPROVEMENTS: Modify src/TaskPanel.jsx to reduce vertical space per task. Changes: reduce py-2 to py-1 on task rows, reduce gap-2 to gap-1, make Row 2 (group/priority/due) more compact with smaller text, remove the section icon emojis, reduce section header padding. Goal: fit 50%+ more tasks visible without scrolling.

SIDEBAR GROUP COLORS: In the existing TaskPanel.jsx sidebar view, apply group colors to: the group filter buttons (use colored dot or colored bg when active), and the group name text in each task row (colored text matching group color).

ADD VIEW TOGGLE: In src/App.jsx, add state `taskViewMode` with values 'sidebar' and 'fullscreen'. Add an expand/maximize button in the TaskPanel header that switches to fullscreen mode. In fullscreen mode, render FullTaskManager instead of TaskPanel. The FullTaskManager has a 'collapse to sidebar' button that switches back.

RENDERING IN APP.JSX: When taskViewMode is 'fullscreen' and showTaskPanel is true, render FullTaskManager as a full-screen overlay (fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-white) or as the main content. Pass all the same task-related props. Ensure the user can close/exit back to the canvas.
Ensure group management (add/rename/delete groups, color picker) is available in both views.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar view shows tasks with reduced padding - visibly more compact than before
A button in the sidebar header expands to full-screen task manager
Full-screen view shows ALL groups simultaneously as collapsible sections (not filtered one at a time)
Each group section has a colored header matching the group's assigned color
Tasks display in single-row table format: Status | Title | Location | Priority | Due Date
Clicking a task row expands it inline showing full notes and edit controls
Only one task is expanded at a time - clicking another collapses the previous
User can switch back from full-screen to sidebar view
Group colors appear on group headers, task row left borders, and group filter indicators
Task ordering (move up/down) works in both views
Status can be toggled inline in both views
Search and status filters work in the full-screen view
New task creation works in the full-screen view
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run `npm run build` to confirm no compilation errors
findings: Build succeeds. FullTaskManager uses fixed inset-0 z-50 overlay. Group colors applied via getGroupColor helper in both views. TaskPanel density reduced with py-1 and mt-0.5. View toggle uses taskViewMode state in App.jsx.
